# JDK-8340708: Optimize StackMapGenerator::processMethod

> **PR**: [21137](https://github.com/openjdk/jdk/pull/21137) | **Author**: wenshao | **Status**: merged

## Summary

A small optimization of processMethod, by using local variables and extracting exception methods, reduces codeSize from 326 to 283
